pi_items.source: task.json description specifies exact text to be entered; verifier.py line 33 confirms it checks for fragment 'community health drive'; export_result.sh queries retireReason field via OpenMRS REST API

Verified against OpenMRS documentation pattern for admin interface URL; task_utils.sh confirms BAHMNI_BASE_URL='https://localhost' and OPENMRS_BASE_URL pattern; OpenMRS Wiki confirms /openmrs/admin is standard admin path

privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a Bahmni/OpenMRS system (synthetic demo environment) to retire a location named 'Satellite Clinic East'. The location is created synthetically during task setup via the OpenMRS REST API at https://localhost/openmrs/ws/rest/v1/location. When retired, it must be annotated with the exact reason: 'Temporary location closed after community health drive'. The OpenMRS admin interface is accessible at https://localhost/openmrs/admin. The verifier checks that the location (1) is retired in both API and database, (2) has the correct retire reason, (3) was not pre-retired, (4) still exists (not purged), and (5) was retired after task start time.
